_comment_server: During native AR development, point `server.url` at your running dev server (e.g. http://192.168.x.x:3000) so the app loads live JS instead of a bundled build. Remove the `server` block entirely for production builds so it loads from webDir instead.

ios._comment_camera: Info.plist must also declare NSCameraUsageDescription — Xcode won't auto-generate this. See ios/App/App/Info.plist notes in the plugin README stub.
ios._comment_motion: Info.plist must also declare NSMotionUsageDescription for deviceorientation/devicemotion access (same permission GameCanvas.jsx's motionPermission gate already handles on the JS side).

android._comment_camera: AndroidManifest.xml must declare <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" /> and <uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera.ar" android:required="true" /> for ARCore.
android._comment_arcore: AndroidManifest.xml must also declare <meta-data android:name="com.google.ar.core" android:value="required" /> so the Play Store only shows this app to ARCore-capable devices.

plugins._comment: The custom VeggieGoAR plugin (native/ios + native/android skeletons below) registers itself automatically via Capacitor's plugin discovery — no entry needed here unless you want to pass static config to it.
